glyphs.label: Summons
glyphs.semantic_intent: Call / ping / get-attention identity — vertical signal emphasis without alarm clichés
glyphs.description: Vertical signal-post silhouette for summons and ping hails. Registry expansion v002 — Axiom inline SVG.
glyphs.generation_prompt: Minimal vector hail glyph: vertical signal post with subtle radial ticks, 48x48 viewBox, strong vertical emphasis, Control Alt stroke language, no bell or alarm-clock clichés.
glyphs.review_notes: Axiom UI only until Android/LCARD parity slice. Promote after operator review.

glyphs.label: Alert
glyphs.semantic_intent: Urgent / warning identity — angular stacked pulses, severity from palette not glyph clutter
glyphs.description: Stacked pulse bars with caution dot for alert and urgent hails. Registry expansion v002.
glyphs.generation_prompt: Minimal vector hail glyph: three stacked horizontal bars tapering inward with a caution stem below, 48x48, angular but readable at TV distance, no emoji or alarm icons.
glyphs.review_notes: Axiom UI only until delivery parity. Severity carried by palette/effect, not glyph detail.

glyphs.label: Route
glyphs.semantic_intent: Motion / transport / send identity — forward wave with direction cue
glyphs.description: Dual forward waves with direction tick for transporter and route hails. Registry expansion v002.
glyphs.generation_prompt: Minimal vector hail glyph: two forward wave strokes with a subtle direction tick, 48x48, distinct from other registry marks, Control Alt stroke weight.
glyphs.review_notes: Axiom UI only until delivery parity. Pair with transporter effect presets.

glyphs.label: Beacon
glyphs.semantic_intent: Gather / here / home-room identity — orbit node with center mark
glyphs.description: Orbit arc with center node for gather, home, and here hails. Registry expansion v002.
glyphs.generation_prompt: Minimal vector hail glyph: center node with subtle orbit arc and cardinal ticks, 48x48, gather/home tone without house clip-art.
glyphs.review_notes: Axiom UI only until delivery parity. Distinct from summons vertical post.

glyphs.label: Default
glyphs.semantic_intent: Neutral fallback hail mark when no dedicated glyph is mapped
glyphs.description: Diamond/star fallback used when glyph_id is unknown or unmapped. Contract emoji fallback ✦.
glyphs.generation_prompt: Minimal neutral hail placeholder: simple diamond or four-point star, high contrast, 48x48, legible at 10-foot TV distance.
glyphs.review_notes: Approved system placeholder. Refine for TV-distance legibility in a future polish slice — no asset replacement in registry v001.
